text:
aused by diseases.
Jupiter and Saturn in an Upacaya house make one famous and
honoured by the king, and elsewhere he will be devoid of honour
and wealth. Venus and Saturn joining in the Lagna, a Kona
(5 or 9) or a Kendra except the 7th make one come under the
influence of women, rich, a commander under a king; and else-
where he will be bereft of courage and wealth.
I think it would be better for you if I gave the effects of the
combination of three planets. The following table shows the
effects;—
Sun, Moon & Mars'.—Sinner, short-lived, without friends,
wife and children, infirm, miserly and despised by the people.
Sun, Mars & Mercury:—Hater of his religion, living in a
foreign country, stingy, merciless and miserable owing to the
loss" of his hard-earned money.
Sun, Mercury & Jupiter:—Intelligent, favourite of the
sovereign, without money in old age, and fed by others and
troubling others.
Sun, Jupiter & Venus: —Charitable, renowned a king,
